summary: ClearPath Movers is the best synthetic value and cheapest supported option. Northstar improved by 500 USD but remains 100 USD higher. BudgetLift ties Northstar on price but is non-binding and disclosed mandatory fees only after probing.

vendor.name: Northstar Relocation
vendor.behavior_summary: Premium synthetic vendor that negotiates with verified leverage.

rationale: Binding total after a 500 USD reduction.

vendor.name: BudgetLift Moving
vendor.behavior_summary: Low synthetic headline with hidden charges.

rationale: Mandatory fees appeared only after probing.

transcript_evidence.excerpt: This synthetic binding quote is twenty-four hundred dollars including travel.
transcript_evidence.claim: The all-in total and travel inclusion were stated.

transcript_evidence.excerpt: After your question, the synthetic estimate also needs stairs, long-carry, and fuel fees.
transcript_evidence.claim: Three material fees were disclosed only after direct questioning.

transcript_evidence.excerpt: Using the verified ClearPath total, the synthetic price drops by five hundred dollars.
transcript_evidence.claim: A verified competitor produced a measurable price improvement.
